outcome_text: Interdisciplinary AI actors, competencies, skills, and capacities for establishing context reflect demographic diversity and broad domain and user experience expertise, and their roles are documented and understood.
scoring_text: Knowledge of interdisciplinary team composition requirements for AI context-setting, including assembling diverse domain expertise, ensuring demographic representation, documenting team roles and competencies, and leveraging broad user experience to inform AI system context.
_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of interdisciplinary team composition requirements for AI context-setting, including assembling diverse domain expertise, ensuring demographic representation, documenting team roles and competencies, and leveraging broad user experience to inform AI system context.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in facilitating data and AI communities of practice, including knowledge sharing forums, best practice documentation, cross-team collaboration initiatives, and capability building activities.
comments: NIST AI RMF MP-1.2 (MAP) superset of WIDAI OP domain. OP-S-010 is the strongest match (STS: 0.644, cosine: 0.643). Secondary: TF-A-001 (TF, cosine: 0.591), LS-S-009 (LS, cosine: 0.588).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression. Primary method for all elements. Scores the competency_implication text (workforce competency interpretation of the risk management outcome) against WIDAI KSA statements.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.4/10 (raw 0.644). Shared vocabulary: [ai, knowledge, team]. NIST AI RMF competency implication terms [assembling, broad, competencies, composition, context, demographic] vs WIDAI terms [activities, best, building, capability, collaboration, communities] define the semantic distance.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.875 (P=0.872, R=0.879). Balanced P/R — the 32-word competency implication and 23-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference classification. NLI entailment is systematically low for competency→competency pairs because NLI measures strict logical implication, not semantic relatedness. Primary diagnostic value is in detecting contradiction.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: notable entailment (96.9%). "Knowledge of interdisciplinary team composition requirements for AI context-sett" shows logical implication toward "Skill in facilitating data and AI communities of practice, including knowledge s" — stronger than typical for cross-framework competency pairs, reinforcing the STS-based relationship.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.643 ≈ STS 0.644 (gap 0.002). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [ai, knowledge, team] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 13.3%. Shared tokens: [ai, knowledge, team]. NIST AI RMF-only: [assembling, broad, competencies, composition, context, demographic]. WIDAI-only: [activities, best, building, capability, collaboration, communities].
